title: docker api: NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPv6Addresses type mismatch
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? **

/kind bug

**Description**

When inspecting a container with non-empty `NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPv6Addresses` I get the following error: `Error response from daemon: json: cannot unmarshal string into Go struct field NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPv6Addresses of type network.Address` 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

Having created a `container` with non-empty `NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPv6Addresses` call podman with the docker SDK like this:
```golang
inspected, err := cli.ContainerInspect(context.Background(), container.ID)                                                                                                                  
if err != nil {                                                                                                                                                                             
  log.Panicf("could not inspect container %v\n", err)                                                                                                                                       
} 
```
**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
The `[]string` type defined here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/056f492f59c333d521ebbbe186abde0278e815db/libpod/define/container_inspect.go#L561 is not compatible with `[]networktypes.Address` defined here https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/7b9275c0da707b030e62c96b679a976f31f929d3/daemon/network/settings.go#L25.  (networktypes.Address from https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/7b9275c0da707b030e62c96b679a976f31f929d3/api/types/network/network.go#L7-L10)

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.1
API Version:  3.4.1
Go Version:   go1.16.8
Built:        Wed Oct 20 14:35:28 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
